message: add flag to NSSP data is_state_value to standard and bundle files
set wyoming to missing for recnt years
fix fips coding for counties on NSSP
mostly updated data. Some epic endpoints failing on virus pipeline
update formatting to standardize dates etc
replace xz with gz for Epic

info.full_name: Percent of Emergency department visits coded as being caused by RSV
info.long_name: Percent of ED visits caused by RSV
info.long_description: Percent of ED visits due to RSV in each week

info.full_name: Percent of Emergency department visits coded as being caused by influenza
info.long_name: Percent of ED visits caused by Influenza
info.long_description: Percent of ED visits due to Influenza in each week

info.full_name: Percent of Emergency department visits coded as being caused by covid
info.long_name: Percent of ED visits caused by COVID-19
info.long_description: Percent of ED visits due to COVID-19 in each week

info.full_name: Indicator that the county value was imputed from state-level data
info.short_description: Flag indicating county values were imputed from state-level data
info.long_description: Equals 1 when the county-level percent of ED visits for COVID-19, influenza, or RSV was missing in NSSP and was imputed using the state-level value (so all counties in that state share the same value for that week); 0 when county-level data were reported directly.

percent_visits_rsv.full_name: Percent of Emergency department visits coded as being caused by RSV
percent_visits_rsv.long_name: Percent of ED visits caused by RSV
percent_visits_rsv.long_description: Percent of ED visits due to RSV in each week

percent_visits_flu.full_name: Percent of Emergency department visits coded as being caused by influenza
percent_visits_flu.long_name: Percent of ED visits caused by Influenza
percent_visits_flu.long_description: Percent of ED visits due to Influenza in each week

percent_visits_covid.full_name: Percent of Emergency department visits coded as being caused by covid
percent_visits_covid.long_name: Percent of ED visits caused by COVID-19
percent_visits_covid.long_description: Percent of ED visits due to COVID-19 in each week

is_state_estimate.full_name: Indicator that the county value was imputed from state-level data
is_state_estimate.short_description: Flag indicating county values were imputed from state-level data
is_state_estimate.long_description: Equals 1 when the county-level percent of ED visits for COVID-19, influenza, or RSV was missing in NSSP and was imputed using the state-level value (so all counties in that state share the same value for that week); 0 when county-level data were reported directly.

nssp.name: National Syndromic Surveillance Program (NSSP)
nssp.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nssp.description: This dataset provides the percentage of emergency department patient visits for the specified pathogen of all ED patient visits for the specified geographic part of the country that were observed for the given week from data submitted to the National Syndromic Surveillance Program (NSSP). Note that the reported sub-state trends are from Health Service Areas (HSA) and the data reported from the health care facilities located within the given HSA. Health Service Areas are regions of one or more counties that align to patterns of care seeking. The HSA level data are reported for each county in the HSA. Some states report state-level data but not county-level data. In these instances, PopHIVE maps the state-level data to the counties in that state so that all counties in the state share the same value. These data are made available by the CDC.
nssp.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
